feats.description: Skilled at mimicry and dramatics. Gain +1 CHA. You have Advantage on Deception and Performance checks when trying to pass yourself off as a different person, and you can mimic speech or sounds after hearing them for at least 1 minute.
Gain +1 STR or DEX. Standing from prone costs only 5 feet of movement, climbing no longer costs extra movement, and you can make a running long jump or high jump after moving only 5 feet.

Gain +1 STR or DEX. When you take the Dash action, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks from the creature you attack this turn, and if you move at least 10 feet straight before a melee hit you can add 1d8 damage or push the target 10 feet.

Gain +1 CON or WIS. You gain proficiency with Cook's Utensils. During a Short Rest you can cook treats equal to your proficiency bonus; a creature can eat one as a Bonus Action to gain temporary HP equal to your proficiency bonus.
Crossbow Expert: Gain a +1 ability increase where noted and the feat's listed combat or utility benefits per 2024 PHB rules text.
